caption: A person's hands are shown manipulating a "Topps CLEARLY AUTHENTIC 2020" trading card box. The box features imagery of a baseball player and a baseball, along with the text "ONE ENCASED AUTO" and "ACETATE CARD PER BO". In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap is visible within a small inset window, sitting in front of a computer monitor. The foreground is dominated by a large graphic banner that reads "CASEBREAKS" in bold white letters with a red and black border. As the sequence progresses, the person's hands move the box, shifting its angle and position to show different sides of the packaging. The "CASEBREAKS" banner remains static at the bottom, and the smaller video feed of the man remains visible in the lower right, showing him observing the process.
